_doc: LOCAL-ONLY backlog for the in-place Ralph loop (gitignored; the shell owns task status — the agent must NOT edit this file). Schema: docs/HARNESS.md §8. All tasks are verifiable with NO live paid-API calls.

tasks.design: Clarification (interview 2026-06-22): Design for a BLACK BOX — a user must understand the data from the dashboard alone, with no knowledge of system internals. Show the contract's expected shape AND a small sample/summary of the ACTUAL artifact that flowed, with pass/fail per expectation, worded for a non-expert reader.

tasks.title: Workflow-run DAG: fix the graph layout on mobile/narrow widths
tasks.design: Clarification (interview 2026-06-22): Switch to a TOP-DOWN (vertical) DAG layout below the mobile breakpoint — don't just re-centre the left-to-right layout. Validate at ~402px AND desktop via viewport screenshots recorded in the worklog.

Make the DAG prettier — outlined/boxed job nodes
tasks.design: Clarification (interview 2026-06-22): Style = subtle bordered cards: 1px border, rounded corners, padding, and a COLOURED STATUS ACCENT (a left accent bar or dot) — NOT whole-card status tinting. Keep it understated and scannable.

tasks.title: Strip workflow-level properties from individual jobs
tasks.design: Clarification (interview 2026-06-22): Remove ALL job-level properties — schedule, enabled toggle, next-run, the instructions panel, AND the per-job Run-now button. The job page becomes a read-only member view (status, run history, logs). You run a workflow, never a job.

tasks.title: Show validation gates on the workflow definition graph
Fragrantica accord percentages still null — evaluate + fix end-to-end
tasks.design: Clarification (interview 2026-06-22): ROOT CAUSE — fetch.ts persists only innerText (pages/<id>.txt); the accord bar widths live in raw HTML that is saved ONLY for failed pages (pages-failed/<id>.html). T009's parser reads pages/<id>.html, which never exists on the success path, so pct always falls back to null. FIX: extend fetch.ts to ALSO persist the raw HTML alongside the .txt so widths survive going forward (keep the .txt for the Claude parse step). The committed unit test stays hermetic on a synthetic HTML fixture (do NOT commit real Fragrantica HTML). END-TO-END proof is for the agent's own confidence: ONE local live fetch of a single perfume (paced via the fragrantica service) is allowed to confirm fetch.ts persists HTML and parse fills real pcts — be frugal; the monthly cap is the only hard ceiling. The existing 42 outputs stay null until re-fetched in production.

tasks.title: Backlog view: pending shows pending, not in progress
tasks.design: Clarification (interview 2026-06-22): This was implemented in commit 2e65bbb then reverted in e37e40c; re-apply EXACTLY as that commit did and make it stick — the list shows 'pending' (no '▶ in progress'), drop the next-task list highlight/border, and keep the DAG view's accurately-labelled 'next' node highlight as-is.
